canonical_e2e_risk_detail: Default path (env=0) unchanged from pre-F206. Providerless path (env=1) is bounded and safe for M1 except Wayback diverges from FetchCoordinator (consistency issue, not M1 crash vector).

providerless_cascade.notes: Correctly env-gated. Default=0 means canonical path unchanged.

fusion_ranker.notes: Lazy import — only loaded when env=1 AND providerless mode active. No import cost for default path. In-process RRF+MMR, no MLX/GPU.

discovery_planner.notes: Standalone planning tool with search()/execute(). Not called by live_public_pipeline canonical path. Returns DiscoveryPlan (not results). ProviderStatsRegistry wired but planner never invoked in production pipeline.

provider_stats.notes: Stats persist only when discovery_planner is explicitly used. Default path doesn't use planner so stats not populated.

commoncrawl_cdx.notes: discovery_planner runner calls Wayback adapter as placeholder. Comment: '# TODO: commoncrawl-specific endpoint when adapter supports it'. duckduckgo_adapter._search_commoncrawl_cdx is ACTIVE (real HTTP call to commoncrawl.org) but not wired from planner.

feed_pivots.notes: Returns empty DiscoveryBatchResult with error='feed_pivots_no_pipeline_context', error_type='not_wired'. Comment: 'Stub: return empty — the planner avoids this provider when budget is tight.'

ct_pivots.notes: Returns empty DiscoveryBatchResult with error='ct_pivots_no_pipeline_context', error_type='not_wired'. Comment: 'Stub: return empty — the planner selects it opportunistically.'

historical_frontier.notes: DuckDB shadow_findings read-only. No network fetch. 2s timeout. Safe for M1.

wayback_cdx.notes: Uses aiohttp.ClientSession directly — bypasses FetchCoordinator/cURL JA3 fingerprint and circuit breaker. 5s timeout, fail-soft. This is a fetch-layer divergence from canonical path. Not an M1 crash vector (no asyncio.run, no MLX), but a stealth/consistency gap.

pq_crypto.notes: NullPostQuantumBackend always available. ML-DSA-65 only on macOS 26+. No production call sites. No MLX/GPU allocation. Pure Python dataclasses.

pq_crypto_swift.notes: Calls shutil.which('secure-enclave-helper') only when PQ commands explicitly invoked. All failures return safe defaults. No subprocess unless PQ activated.

pq_export_encryption.notes: Fail-closed PQ_REQUIRED policy. Null backend always available. HPKE X-Wing only on macOS 26+.

secure_enclave.notes: PQ crypto layer via secure-enclave-helper tool. Not referenced on canonical path.

hermes_gate.notes: Directory tests/probe_hermes_authority not found in repository.

live_public_pipeline.notes: Canonical path unchanged. Providerless wiring env-gated correctly at lines 3091-3105. Provider metadata propagates to verdict (lines 2588-2601). Additive new verdict fields from F206S.

sprint_scheduler.notes: 5879 lines. No new heavy imports. F206S hasattr guard is defensive fix. No new model loads or network calls.

sprint_exporter.notes: F206S additive truth surfaces — new optional fields in public_branch_verdict. Schema is additive only — no breaking changes.

layers.notes: 23 files. Multiple .bak_F206* backups present (sprint artifact). Active files unchanged. No M1 memory risk.

brain_decision_engine.notes: Uses loop.run_until_complete() (not asyncio.run()) — safe for M1. 307 lines, no new imports.

brain_research_flow_decider.notes: Same run_until_complete pattern as decision_engine. Safe for M1. 280 lines.

probe_providerless_discovery.notes: Env wiring correct, cascade functions active

probe_public_branch_diagnosis.notes: PRE-EXISTING: ddgs package deprecated (pip install ddgs needed). Not a production regression.

pre_existing_failures.reason: ddgs package deprecated and not installed

recommended_next_sprint_detail.scope: Replace aiohttp.ClientSession in wayback_cdx_adapter.py with FetchCoordinator or httpx H2 call to maintain JA3 fingerprint consistency and circuit breaker coverage for Wayback results.
recommended_next_sprint_detail.rationale: Wayback is the only divergence from canonical fetch path (aiohttp vs FetchCoordinator). This is a consistency/stealth issue, not an M1 crash vector — but should be aligned for uniform circuit breaker and JA3 coverage.

default_env_0.reason: No new imports, no model loads, no asyncio.run(), no memory growth. Path identical to pre-F206.

providerless_env_1.reason: No MLX/GPU, no asyncio.run(). Wayback uses aiohttp (not M1-crash vector). 5s timeout prevents runaway. mx.eval([]) not needed.

verdict_conditions_met: Active vs Dormant vs Stub classification complete (14 components)
No production code changes — read-only audit
Test matrix run — 10/11 suites pass, 1 pre-existing failure clearly identified
Report + JSON matrix created in probe_reality_lock/
Next sprint recommendation: Option A (single-file, bounded, addresses only real divergence)
